chapter_context.summary: Relieved by Timothy's report of their steadfastness despite persecution, Paul expresses his joy and prays for an opportunity to visit them again to strengthen their faith.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Timothy's Mission to Thessalonica (3:1-5), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.
This section focuses on Timothy's Encouraging Report (3:6-10), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.
This section focuses on Paul's Prayer for the Church (3:11-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Thessalonians.

1.commentary:
### Tyndale Study Notes
**Chapter Overview: 1 Thessalonians 3**
This verse contributes to the central message of 1 Thessalonians, emphasizing the grace and truth revealed in Jesus Christ.
1.full_commentary:
### Matthew Henry Commentary
Matthew Henry offers devotional reflections on the spiritual impact of this passage for the believer.

### Jamieson-Fausset-Brown
JFB analysis explores the historical context and original language nuances of this portion of the New Testament.

cultural_historical.title: New Testament Context
cultural_historical.text: Written in the 1st century AD to diverse groups of believers across the Roman Empire.
